allow: PowerShell($env:MIE_DEV_AUTH="1"; Start-Process -FilePath ".\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -ArgumentList "-m","uvicorn","app.main:app","--port","8000" -RedirectStandardOutput "uvicorn.out" -RedirectStandardError "uvicorn.err" -PassThru | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Id | Out-File -Encoding utf8 uvicorn.pid; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:8000/healthz -UseBasicParsing\).Content; \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:8000/ -UseBasicParsing\).StatusCode; Stop-Process -Id \(Get-Content uvicorn.pid\) -Force; Remove-Item uvicorn.pid,uvicorn.out,uvicorn.err -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
PowerShell($env:PYTHONIOENCODING="utf-8"; .\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -c "from app.faculty import get_registry; r = get_registry\(\)")

PowerShell(Get-Process -Name python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { \(Get-NetTCPConnection -OwningProcess $_.Id -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object LocalPort -eq 8000\) } | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep 1; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalPort, State, OwningProcess)

PowerShell($env:MIE_DEV_AUTH="1"; $env:PYTHONIOENCODING="utf-8"; $p = Start-Process -FilePath ".\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -ArgumentList "-m","uvicorn","app.main:app","--port","8101" -RedirectStandardOutput "uvicorn.out" -RedirectStandardError "uvicorn.err" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:8101/ -UseBasicParsing | Out-Null } catch {}; Get-Content uvicorn.err -Tail 25 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force; Remove-Item uvicorn.out,uvicorn.err -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
